insight: Thorium Dynamo is not inherently breachproof, but going BP with Dynamo can be very strong in certain sets. A line of letting the opponent deal 6 damage to your Dynamo and then transitioning to two Blastforges and absorbing has been discussed as a potential approach, though its validity was not confirmed.
author: masn6811
context: masn6811 sharing an unconfirmed strategic line involving Dynamo and transitioning to absorb in a BP context.
